ItacPersonItem.Notes: Lolino received a degree in utroque iure, and then in theology from the University of Padua. He was an expert of Greek and Latin languages. In 1596 he was appointed Bishop of Belluno by Pope Clement VIII. Lolino joined the Ricovrati in 1600.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
